layer-order.css:
/* Generated by Lowdefy build */
@layer theme, base, antd, components, utilities;

properties.subTitle: Sorry, the page you are visiting does not exist.

properties.content: This is the overview section with general information.

url.description: An external URL to link to.

newWindow.description: Open the link in a new window.

input.description: Input to pass to the linked page.

darkMode.description: Set dark mode preference. When not provided, cycles through light, dark, and system.

content.description: Box content string. Overrides the "content" content area.

onClick.description: Trigger actions when the Box is clicked.

onPaste.description: Trigger actions when the element is focused and a paste event is triggered.

ariaLabel.description: Arial-label to apply to link tag.

back.description: When the link is clicked, trigger the browser back.

home.description: When the link is clicked, route to the home page.

input.description: When the link is clicked, pass data as the input object to the next Lowdefy page.  Can only be used with pageId link and newTab false.

urlQuery.description: When the link is clicked, pass data as a url query to the next page.

icon.description: Name of an React-Icon (See all icons) or properties of an Icon block for anchor icon.

pageId.description: When the link is clicked, route to the provided Lowdefy page.

href.description: The href to link to when the anchor link is clicked.

url.description: External url to link to when the anchor link is clicked.

rel.description: The relationship of the linked URL as space-separated link types.

newTab.description: Open link in a new tab when the anchor link is clicked.

replace.description: Prevent adding a new entry into browser history by replacing the url instead of pushing into history. Can only be used with pageId link and newTab false.

scroll.description: Disable scrolling to the top of the page after page transition. Can only be used with pageId link and newTab false.

title.description: Text to display in the anchor.

onClick.description: Called when Anchor is clicked. Renders a shortcut badge when a shortcut is configured.

html.description: Content to be rendered as Html.

DOMPurifyOptions.description: Customize DOMPurify options. Options are only applied when the block is mounted, thus any parsed settings is only applied at first render.

html.description: Content to be rendered as Html.

onTextSelection.description: Trigger action when text is selected and pass selected text to the event object.

name.description: Name of icon to be displayed.

rotate.description: Number of degrees to rotate the icon.

disableLoadingIcon.description: While loading after the icon has been clicked, don't render the loading icon.

onClick.description: Trigger actions when icon is clicked.

alt.description: Alternative text description of the image.

crossOrigin.description: Indicates if the fetching of the image must be done using a CORS request.

decoding.description: An image decoding hint to the browser. Sync for atomic presentation with other content, async,  to reduce delay in presenting other content and auto leave to browser to decide.

loading.description: How the browser should load the image. Eager loads the image immediately, lazy, defers loading until the image it reaches a calculated distance from the viewport, as defined by the browser.

sizes.description: Indicating a set of source sizes of strings separated by commas.

srcSet.description: Possible image sources for the user agent to use, strings separated by commas.

direction.description: List content along a 'row' or down a 'column'. Applies the 'flex-direction' css property to the List block.

wrap.description: Specifies wrapping style to be applied to List block as 'wrap', 'nowrap' or 'wrap-reverse'. Applies the 'flex-wrap' css property to the List block - defaults to 'wrap', requires List direction to be set.

scroll.description: Specifies whether scrolling should be applied to the List, can be true or false. Applies the 'overflow' css property to the List block - defaults to 'visible', requires List direction to be set.

onClick.description: Trigger actions when the List is clicked.

content.description: Span content string. Overrides the "content" content area.

onClick.description: Trigger actions when the Span is clicked.

message.default: Intentional error thrown by Throw block

animated.description: Whether to change tabs with animation. Only works while tabPlacement is top or bottom.

defaultActiveKey.description: Initial active TabPane's key, if activeKey is not set.

title.description: Title of the tab - supports html.

icon.description: Name of an React-Icon (See all icons) or properties of an Icon block to customize icon to show in tab title.

shortcut.description: Keyboard shortcut to switch to this tab. Use "mod" for Cmd/Ctrl.

extraAreaKey.description: Area key for the extra area blocks.

theme.description: Antd design token overrides for this block. See antd design tokens.

horizontalItemPaddingLG.description: Padding of large horizontal tab item.

horizontalItemPaddingSM.description: Padding of small horizontal tab item.

inkBarColor.description: Color of the active tab indicator bar.

titleFontSizeLG.description: Font size of large tab title.

titleFontSizeSM.description: Font size of small tab title.

event.activeKey: The key of the active tab.

event.key: The key of the clicked tab.

loading.description: Control the loading status of Statistic.

prefixIcon.description: Name of an React-Icon (See all icons) or properties of an Icon block to customize icon which prefix the statistic.

suffixIcon.description: Name of an React-Icon (See all icons) or properties of an Icon block to customize icon which suffix the statistic.

title.description: Title to describe the component - supports html.

contentFontWeight.description: Font weight of the statistic value.

colorText.description: Default text color for the statistic value.
